RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_PERSON_CHEST_: Use only outside combat. Randomly reveal 4 different persona relics you do not own. Choose 1 to obtain.
Choose a persona relic to obtain
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_CANDY_SUPPORT: Use on any player. The target heals [blue]6[/blue] HP, gains {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, and removes [gold]Doom[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_CANDY_ENERGY_: Use only on a player with [gold]Modification[/gold]. The target gains [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Modification[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold], [blue]3[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red], and [blue]2[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green] for [blue]2[/blue] turns.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_CANDY_BIG_BRA: Use on any player. The target draws [blue]3[/blue] cards, then removes [gold]Modification[/gold] and [gold]Doom[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_VIAL_ANOMALY_: Use only in combat. Automatically plays [card]Transfer Request[/card].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_VIAL_NEUTRAL_: Use only in combat. Randomly draw 3 from [card]Crowded Passage[/card], [card]Equality[/card], [card]Player Representative[/card], and [card]Thunder Approaches[/card], then choose 1 to play.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_VIAL_GOOD_EVE: Use only in combat. Randomly draw 3 from [card]Fight, Fun![/card], [card]Gift from Sky[/card], [card]Red Heat Warning[/card], and [card]Sprint[/card], then choose 1 to play.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POTION_VIAL_DEUS_EX_: Use only in combat. Automatically plays [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card].
